text:
On Wed, March 5, 2008 5:36 pm, Pavel Motyrev wrote:

So from the errors you are getting One would imagine that you are
installing the wrong distribution for your machine (like pc98 or something
which you dont own); can you tell us what you downloaded and thus tried to
install? If it's incorrect I'll point you to the proper images..

Thanks,
remko
